notes: Complete ground-up rewrite with three independent device types
Hub: WiFi + ESP-NOW coordinator with MQTT / Home Assistant bridge
Remote: Ultra-low-power ESP32-C3 battery sensor node with deep sleep
Greenhouse: Multi-zone relay controller with automation engine
Shared library: config manager (NVS + CRC32), ESP-NOW mesh, MQTT auto-discovery
ADS1115, direct ADC, and CD74HC4067 mux sensor support
Captive portal for first-run WiFi provisioning
OTA firmware updates via web UI and this installer
